domain.name: document_processing
domain.description: Document processing & straight-through posting (use case #3 — the hardest write case). A DocExtractAgent OCRs an inbound document (invoice / claim / contract / onboarding packet), extracts its fields, retrieves the vendor record + the governing validation rules, and PROPOSES a ledger posting — it never posts directly. The proposal carries a ConfidenceScore and a RiskTier. Clean, low-value, high-confidence docs auto-post to the system of record; anything above a $ threshold OR below an extraction-confidence threshold holds at an OutSystems Human Approval activity (BPT) until a finance_approver signs off before the write lands. The bounded action space (post-to-ledger | route-for-review | flag-exception) + the human-at-the-write-step is what makes it ship, not just reason. Every action is audited.

capabilities.name: IngestDocument
capabilities.note: Intake — registers an inbound document (invoice/claim/contract/onboarding packet) against a vendor and kicks off extraction + posting. Raises DocumentReceived to start the workflow.

capabilities.name: ExtractDocument
capabilities.note: THE AGENT. Grounds on the Document (OCR via native retrieval tool), the Vendor record, and the active ValidationRules. Extracts fields (writes ExtractedField rows with per-field Confidence), computes an ExtractionConfidence, validates against the rules, and PROPOSES a ProposedPosting (post_to_ledger|route_for_review|flag_exception) carrying a ConfidenceScore + RiskTier. It never writes a LedgerEntry directly — it proposes; the write-step lands elsewhere.

capabilities.name: PostToLedger
capabilities.note: The bounded WRITE to the system of record: create the LedgerEntry (push to the ERP stub), mark the ProposedPosting executed + the Document posted, audited. Called by the workflow — auto for low-risk/low-$, or after human approval.

capabilities.name: RouteForReview
capabilities.note: The second bounded write: send the proposal to the finance_approver review queue, audited.

capabilities.name: FlagException
capabilities.note: The third bounded write: mark the document an exception (failed validation / low confidence) for manual handling, audited.

capabilities.name: PostingWorkflow
capabilities.note: HITL via OutSystems BPT: on DocumentReceived the workflow runs the DocExtractAgent to produce a ProposedPosting; a decision gate reads its RiskTier + Amount + ConfidenceScore — low RiskTier AND under the $ threshold AND above the confidence threshold auto-calls PostToLedger (straight-through post); otherwise it holds at a Human Approval activity (RouteForReview) until a finance_approver signs off, THEN calls PostToLedger; a failed validation calls FlagException. The approval + audit is native workflow, not custom code.

capabilities.name: ApprovalInbox
capabilities.note: Where a human approves/rejects a held posting above the $ threshold or below the confidence threshold — the write-step sign-off before the LedgerEntry lands.

capabilities.name: ManageRules
capabilities.note: Admin maintains the validation-rule corpus the agent grounds on.

integrations.name: OcrService
integrations.purpose: external OCR / document-extraction service the DocExtractAgent retrieves page text + field candidates from as a tool

integrations.name: ErpLedger
integrations.purpose: system-of-record ERP / general-ledger API PostToLedger writes the confirmed LedgerEntry into

integrations.name: Notify
integrations.purpose: clerk/approver notifications on posting, review-routing, or exception
